CustomField.description: When enabled, NPPatch respects Salesforce Duplicate Rule settings during record creation and updates. If a Duplicate Rule's Action is set to "Allow," duplicates will be saved normally. When disabled, NPPatch may block saves that trigger duplicate detection regardless of the rule's Allow/Block setting. Disabled by default.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Respect Duplicate Rule "Allow" settings during NPPatch record processing. When enabled, duplicates are saved if the rule allows them.
CustomField.label: Respect Duplicate Rule Settings
